Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the minor, Leondre Allen.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Jason Rose, Esq. appeared with petitioner Letisha Allen, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Letisha Allen, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner, who appeared at today's hearing via CourtCall, was placed under oath and testified.
Dolores Shaw and Janice, Wrongful Death Heirs of Leon Allen, Deceased, were placed under oath but did not testify.
Order appointing Ms. Allen Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed July 25, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $20,005.57.
Attorney Fees - $6,451.00.
Costs - $24.01.

The net balance of $13,530.57 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Travis Credit Union, Fairfield Branch, Post Box 2069, Vacaville, CA 95696. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years. The Court directs five hundred ($500.00) dollars shall be paid to Letisha Allen as Guardian ad Litem for the purpose of opening of the blocked account. Thereafter, the Court directs that the Minor's funds are to be deposited by Brayton Purcell LLP into the same blocked account.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to June 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for a Progress Report on the Deposit of Money into a Blocked Account.
